changeSet.author: juliwolf
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_unique_custom_view_asset_type_name_deleted_flag ON "custom_view" (asset_type_id, custom_view_name, deleted_flag) WHERE deleted_flag = false;

changeSet.author: juliwolf
changeSet.sql: insert into entity (entity_id, entity_name, deleted_flag) values ('6e1ae00a-2b61-47b0-8f73-d6b0fce1f97a', 'CUSTOM_VIEW', false) ON CONFLICT DO nothing;

changeSet.author: juliwolf
